zh.lifeSummary: 當Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon於大約1112年出生在英國威爾斯文特凱爾萊昂時，他的父親Owain Wan ap Caradog44歲，母親Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog39歲。他於1138年3月4日與Angharad Verch Uchdrud在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1175年享年65歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯紐波特格爾可利福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon于大约1112年出生在英国威尔斯文特凱爾萊昂时，他的父亲Owain Wan ap Caradog44岁，母亲Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog39岁。他于1138年3月4日与Angharad Verch Uchdrud在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1175年享年65岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯紐波特格爾可利福。

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Turkish: ornamental name or nickname from ay ‘Moon’, by extension also ‘beautiful face’.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 艾, see   Ai   2.

variants.name: Ai
meanings: Japanese: usually written 阿井 with characters used phonetically. The meaning could be ‘meeting’. In North America, it may also be a shortened form of some other name.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 艾, referring to ‘Chinese mugwort’, a type of plant used in traditional Chinese medical treatment: (i) perhaps from the second element of Ru Ai (汝艾), the name of an official who lived during the reign of Shao Kang, the 6th king of the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ai Ling (艾陵), the name of a hill (located in Shandong province), the fief of Ai Kong (艾孔), an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) from the placename Ai (艾), the name of a fief (located in Jiangxi province) which was granted to an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) adopted as a surname by the Qu Jin (去斤), Qu Ai (去艾), and Ai Jin (艾斤) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (v) from Ai (艾), the name of an ancient state (possibly in present-day Jiangxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 愛, meaning ‘love’ in Chinese: (i) said to be traced back to Ai Xie Wu (愛邪勿), prime minister of the state of Huihu (known as Uyghur Empire or Uyghur Khaganate), who was endowed with the surname Ai (愛) by Emperor Wuzong of Tang (814–846  AD ). (ii) a Han Chinese surname for some members of the Aisin Gioro family from the Manchu ethnic group, known as the royal family of the Qing dynasty (1616 – 1911  AD ). (iii) a surname from minority ethnic groups in Taiwan.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Swain, Swein (Old Norse Sveinn, Sven, from sveinn ‘lad’).

English: occupational name from Middle English swein ‘servant, attendant; boy, young man’ (Old Norse sveinn). The word could also denote a swineherd or a peasant in general. The name was thoroughly confused with Swan 1.
Irish: when not the English name, possibly an Anglicized form of Mac Suibhne; see McSwain .

variants.name: Swan
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English swon(e), northern Middle English swan(e) ‘swineherd; peasant; male servant’ (Old English swān). Compare Swain 2, with which this name was thoroughly confused.

English: occasionally perhaps a nickname from Middle English swan, swon ‘swan’. In the Middle Ages, the swan was taken as a symbol of false pride, and, according to Chaucer, jealousy. Compare Kite , Nightingale , and Pye .
English: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Swan, an Anglicized form of Old Norse Sveinn. Compare Swain 1.

variants.name: Swainson
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Swain (Old Norse Sveinn; see Swain ) + -son. Compare Swanson .
English (northern): patronymic from Middle English swein ‘servant, attendant; boy, young man’ (Old Norse sveinn) + -son.
Americanized form of Swedish Svensson or of its cognate Sveinsson.

nameMeanings.name: Iorwerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

en.lifeSummary: When Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon was born about 1112, in Caerleon, Gwent, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Owain Wan ap Caradog, was 44 and his mother, Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog, was 39. He married Angharad Verch Uchdrud on 4 March 1138, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died about 1175, at the age of 65, and was buried in Goldcliff, Newport, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon est né environ 1112, à Caerleon, Gwent, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Owain Wan ap Caradog, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Angharad Verch Uchdrud le 4 mars 1138, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé environ 1175, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Goldcliff, Newport, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon um 1112 in Caerleon, Gwent, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Owain Wan ap Caradog 44 und seine Mutter Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog 39. Er hat am 4. März 1138 in London, England, United Kingdom Angharad Verch Uchdrud geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb um 1175 im Alter von 65 Jahren und wurde in Goldcliff, Newport, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon è nato il circa 1112 nel Caerleon, Gwent, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Owain Wan ap Caradog, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Angharad Verch Uchdrud il 4 marzo 1138, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa 1175, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Goldcliff, Newport, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleonが約1112年にイギリスウェールズグウエントケエルレオンで生まれた時，父Owain Wan ap Caradogは44歳，母Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradogは39歳であった。1138年3月4日にイギリスイギリスロンドンでAngharad Verch Uchdrudと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は約1175年に65歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズニュープオルトゴールドクリッフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon(이)가 대략 1112년 영국 웨일스 그웬트 카이를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Owain Wan ap Caradog(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1138년 3월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 Angharad Verch Uchdrud(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1175년 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 뉴포트 골드c리프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon nasceu aproximadamente 1112, em Caerleon, Gwent, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Owain Wan ap Caradog, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Angharad Verch Uchdrud em 4 de março de 1138, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1175, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Goldcliff, Newport, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon родился около 1112 г. в местности каирлеон, гвент, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Owain Wan ap Caradog было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Angharad Verch Uchdrud 4 марта 1138 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер около 1175 г. в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности голдклифф, нюпорт, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon nació aproximadamente 1112, en Caerleon, Gwent, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Owain Wan ap Caradog, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Mrs. Owain Wan ap Caradog, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Angharad Verch Uchdrud el 4 de marzo de 1138, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1175, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Goldcliff, Newport, Gales, Reino Unido.
